meaning: n.(尤指发电厂中核反应堆冷却管的)突然爆裂
examples: For that reason prediction of the blowdown process is essential.
Flush the hottest stream inlet to blowdown or pumpout system to water free the line and exchanger.
Flush the coolest stream inlet to blowdown or pumpout system to water free the line and exchanger.
The plaques inform shoppers that no live trees were harmed in the making of the benches -- the wood came from a natural blowdown.
